_notes.file: Narrative-facing system tables: remnants, hooks, phenomena, domain pools, and reusable story structures.
_notes.editing: Use this file for table-facing prompts that explain why a system matters. Prefer templates with variables over many near-duplicate sentence variants.

sections.humanRemnants: Physical remains of prior human activity.
sections.remnantHooks: Short clauses explaining why a remnant matters now.
sections.phenomena: System-scale oddities that shape travel, surveys, or conflict.
sections.narrativeDomains: Domain-specific authoring guidance and reusable pools.
sections.narrativeVariablePools: Reusable variable lists for narrative templates.
sections.narrativeStructures: Sentence templates that combine generated facts and fallback pools into system-level dramatic situations.

remnantHooks: claimed by three legal owners
contains deleted survey records
appears abandoned but still runs automated routines
sits inside a drifting hazard zone
was erased from corporate maps
is used as bait by criminals
contains evidence that would alter local politics
holds a debt ledger nobody wants audited
keeps transmitting a public evacuation order
contains a censored AI witness
proves the quarantine order was edited after the disaster
marks an old labor massacre as a maintenance accident
contains navigation data for a safer route window
has legal title older than the current concession
is protected by a community funeral compact
contains Sol-interdiction files under seal
is slowly being consumed by programmed regolith
hides survivors who never rejoined the registry
is the only neutral ground for rival claimants
shows the official casualty list is false
contains records of a failed public vote
is still defended by obsolete security routines

phenomena.label: Dense debris disk
phenomena.travelEffect: Approach vectors require slow debris-clearing burns and constant armor checks.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which fragments carry industrial isotopes, transponder ghosts, or hidden operation scars?
phenomena.conflictHook: Insurers, salvagers, and GU traffic auditors dispute who must clear safe lanes.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A cutter drifts beside a glittering wall of rock and frozen metal.

phenomena.label: Recent planetary collision
phenomena.travelEffect: Fresh ejecta, unstable moons, and thermal plumes force ships onto temporary routes.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Was the collision natural resonance failure, redirected impactor, or suppressed engineering mistake?
phenomena.conflictHook: Refugee claims, mineral rights, and liability filings compete before the evidence cools.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A wounded world glows along a continent-sized fracture and newborn ring.

phenomena.label: Resonant compact chain
phenomena.travelEffect: Tight orbital timing creates narrow transfer corridors and expensive missed-burn delays.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Who mapped the stable windows, and what installations are protected by withheld ephemerides?
phenomena.conflictHook: Route controllers, smugglers, and settlement clocks all depend on one resonance model.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Three close worlds cross the display in metronome sequence.

phenomena.label: Trojan megaswarm
phenomena.travelEffect: Trojan clouds force ships through monitored gaps shared by dust and salvage drones.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which clusters are primordial, and which conceal storage hulks or contraband habitats?
phenomena.conflictHook: Mining combines and traffic authorities dispute whether the swarm is resource or hazard.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: The Lagrange horizon looks solid with stones blinking claimant beacons.

phenomena.label: Long-period comet storm
phenomena.travelEffect: Outer approaches become hazardous as cometary arcs shed dust across transfer paths.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: What perturbed the reservoir: passing mass, failed survey burn, or old GU intervention?
phenomena.conflictHook: Water prospectors demand priority while port officials quarantine possibly contaminated ice cargo.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Pale comet tails cross like searchlights over a station short on shielding.

phenomena.label: Captured rogue world
phenomena.travelEffect: The rogue's eccentric orbit creates rare close-pass windows and gravitational surprises.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Do its volatiles, heat signature, or crust records contradict local histories?
phenomena.conflictHook: Colonies, science teams, and GU administrators contest hazard, depot, or archive status.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A lightless planet rolls through floodlamp glare and survey tug exhaust.

phenomena.label: Flare-amplified bleed season
phenomena.travelEffect: Crews move only during shielded windows or risk radiation damage and denial.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which stations are falsifying flare exposure logs to keep traffic moving?
phenomena.conflictHook: GU inspectors freeze permits after a convoy launches on an altered forecast.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A departure hall sits under red storm shutters and expired dosimeter seals.

phenomena.label: Hot Neptune desert survivor
phenomena.travelEffect: Stellar wind and stripped atmospheric flow distort comms and punish close maneuvers.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: How did the planet survive evaporation, and who falsified its hazard data?
phenomena.conflictHook: Energy firms, climate modelers, and regulators fight over access to the proof.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A blue remnant screams around the star, trailing a faint atmospheric wake.

phenomena.label: Snow-line chiral belt
phenomena.travelEffect: Snow-line crossings require screening ice intake and reactor feedstock for asymmetric organics.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Are the chiral signatures local chemistry, imported contamination, or terraforming residue?
phenomena.conflictHook: Biotech firms and GU biosafety officers contest every water-dependent ice claim.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Clean ice turns quarantine amber as every tank flags the same handedness.

phenomena.label: Ring arc with phase dust
phenomena.travelEffect: Phase-dust crossings scramble sensors and force slow approaches through marked lanes.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: What cargo or wreckage is hidden inside the phase-dust blind spots?
phenomena.conflictHook: Rival salvagers accuse lane authorities of selling clean transponder routes.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A beacon skiff drifts beside a glittering arc, hull abraded raw.

phenomena.label: Ice-shell plume moon
phenomena.travelEffect: Plume windows restrict low-orbit approaches to brief corridors with poor sensor reliability.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which plume holds clean volatiles, hidden organics, or mislabeled contamination?
phenomena.conflictHook: A GU survey hold stalls extraction while rival crews falsify plume data.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A lander skids through glittering ejecta as the plume shadow closes.

phenomena.label: Gas giant radiation maze
phenomena.travelEffect: Radiation belts force looping transfers, hardened shelters, and costly orbital delays.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which supposedly safe corridor shifted, and who knew before the convoy entered?
phenomena.conflictHook: Port authorities, insurers, and smugglers fight over legal and lethal corridor maps.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A navigation vault shows a convoy bending toward an uncharted hot belt.

phenomena.label: Failed Iggygate wake
phenomena.travelEffect: Old gate turbulence makes jumps arrive late, offset, or near exclusion buoys.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Is the wake decaying, stabilizing, or being refreshed by unauthorized traffic?
phenomena.conflictHook: A stranded settlement claims GU approved evacuation after knowing the wake was unsafe.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A dead gate frame broadcasts conflicting closure orders from warning drones.

phenomena.label: Moving bleed-node river
phenomena.travelEffect: Transit windows migrate across the system, forcing ships to chase route geometry.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Who can predict the river's next bend before the official bulletin?
phenomena.conflictHook: Navigation guilds and free captains clash over private forecasts and evacuation markets.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A convoy burns toward empty space while station clocks count down.

phenomena.label: Metric mirage zone
phenomena.travelEffect: Distance, mass, and velocity readings disagree, making autopilot corrections unreliable.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which measurements remain trustworthy enough to certify a navigation standard?
phenomena.conflictHook: A shipping combine blames lost cargo on math survivors call knowingly oversold.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A bridge display shows three certified and incompatible approach vectors.

phenomena.label: Native microbial biosphere
phenomena.travelEffect: Biosecurity rules slow landings, cargo transfers, and suit cycling near habitats.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Are the microbes a medical resource, industrial hazard, or protected environmental evidence?
phenomena.conflictHook: GU quarantine orders collide with settlers dependent on local biomass chemistry.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A decon tent steams beside stained sample tanks and disputed filters.

phenomena.label: Failed terraforming biosphere
phenomena.travelEffect: Unstable weather and toxic biomes make surface routes unreliable beyond maintained corridors.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which failure mode is spreading, and which contractor record explains it?
phenomena.conflictHook: Liability courts, cleanup firms, and abandoned settlers need incompatible survival evidence.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Engineered forest rot crawls across a road built for another climate.

phenomena.label: First-wave ghost colony
phenomena.travelEffect: Old landing grids still work but route ships through abandoned hazards.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Who erased the last colony updates, and which sealed habitat still has power?
phenomena.conflictHook: Descendant claimants, insurers, and scavengers need incompatible rulings on the colony's fate.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A lit administration dome broadcasts docking instructions to empty streets.

phenomena.label: Derelict fleet cluster
phenomena.travelEffect: Safe approach requires threading dead hulls, drifting ordnance, and exclusion pings.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which ships were sacrificed, and which still carry recoverable command logs?
phenomena.conflictHook: Salvage crews fight legal priority while families demand proof of what happened.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A frozen convoy hangs around a tender with running lights still on.

phenomena.label: Gardener warning beacon
phenomena.travelEffect: Traffic diverts around the warning radius or accepts fines and inspection risk.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Is the beacon reacting to current hazard, legacy violation, or human tampering?
phenomena.conflictHook: Local authorities exploit the warning while merchants pressure crews to prove it obsolete.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A black compliance buoy repeats a code no nearby port understands.

phenomena.label: Narrow-AI perception fog
phenomena.travelEffect: Certified narrow AIs misclassify hazards, forcing manual survey protocols.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which AI model family fails first, and who certified it for GU routes?
phenomena.conflictHook: A vendor demands recall secrecy while pilots publish route-bankrupting crash footage.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Every cockpit machine labels the same debris cloud as clear passage.

phenomena.label: Censored casualty broadcast loop
phenomena.travelEffect: Navigation channels carry clipped emergency telemetry and official suppression bursts.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: What part of the casualty report is cut before the names finish?
phenomena.conflictHook: The censoring agency wants the loop buried; survivors want authentication.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A rescue frequency repeats names, then drops at one classified timestamp.

phenomena.label: Black-market route beacon lattice
phenomena.travelEffect: Unauthorized microbeacons offer faster routes but can strand crews in toll geometry.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which beacon is the guide, and which was planted to mark prey?
phenomena.conflictHook: Port officials deny the lattice while smugglers sell violent access codes.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A maintenance drone blinks a false safe-window pattern from a relay mast.

phenomena.label: Quarantine perimeter with disputed math
phenomena.travelEffect: Routes detour around a contested exclusion shell with model-dependent boundaries.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which quarantine equation actually matches observed contamination risk?
phenomena.conflictHook: Local ships breach the perimeter after GU expands it onto inhabited docks.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A customs gantry is split by overlapping quarantine projections and armed crews.

phenomena.label: Election-day metric storm cycle
phenomena.travelEffect: A recurring storm disrupts election-window traffic, ballots, and monitors.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Is the cycle natural, exploited, or scheduled around known route instability?
phenomena.conflictHook: Opposition blocs accuse the port council of stranding hostile precincts.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A polling station runs on emergency power beyond delayed ballot shuttles.

phenomena.label: Debt-fleet anchor graveyard
phenomena.travelEffect: Impounded ships crowd anchor lanes, slowing departure permissions and salvage clearance.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which vessels are abandoned collateral, and which crews remain trapped aboard?
phenomena.conflictHook: Creditors auction life-support hours while indebted crews organize a breakout.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Powered-down freighters sit chained to tax buoys, registry lights delinquent.

phenomena.label: Refugee ark parking orbit
phenomena.travelEffect: Approach windows are rationed around life-support dumps, shuttle queues, and quarantine checks.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: When does a parked ark become a permanent jurisdictional crisis?
phenomena.conflictHook: Receiving settlements want labor, not dependents; ark councils refuse family splits.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A generation ship vents gray water over a port delaying clearance.

phenomena.label: Chiral contamination bloom
phenomena.travelEffect: Molecular screening slows fuel, food, and medical transfers near the bloom.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: What supply chain carried the wrong-handed compounds, and who profits?
phenomena.conflictHook: A treatment monopoly pushes controls while workers suspect it preserves the market.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Two nutrient bags test opposite; one is already in the clinic queue.

phenomena.label: Sol-interdiction picket shadow
phenomena.travelEffect: Transit plans account for inspection shadows, silent tracking, and sudden interdiction claims.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: What is the picket watching, and why has its patrol shifted?
phenomena.conflictHook: Local rulers invoke Sol authority while captains seek proof of mandate abuse.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A patrol silhouette tags civilian ships for audit without answering hails.

phenomena.label: Public festival tied to safe transit windows
phenomena.travelEffect: Docking, launch, and local prices surge around celebrated safe windows.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Who controls the forecast that decides when the festival begins?
phenomena.conflictHook: Officials sell civic unity while stranded crews allege the exit window was quietly narrowed.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: Lanterns rise as departure boards quietly cancel the cheaper berths.

phenomena.label: Industrial mirror swarm failure
phenomena.travelEffect: Uncommanded mirrors create heat spikes, blackout arcs, and orbital collision hazards.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Is the swarm failing from cut maintenance, hostile code, or split authority?
phenomena.conflictHook: Settlements demand shade control while owners resist GU emergency seizure.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A daylight blade crawls across a night-side district as control loses another mirror.

phenomena.label: Salvage court evidence cache
phenomena.travelEffect: Cache approaches trigger claim holds and court-licensed patrols.
phenomena.surveyQuestion: Which wreck record would overturn the current salvage rights?
phenomena.conflictHook: Judges, insurers, and crews need the evidence preserved, altered, or lost.
phenomena.sceneAnchor: A locked evidence container transmits chain-of-custody pings to every claimant.

namedFactions.name: Helion Debt Synod
namedFactions.publicFace: a debt-trust court that presents itself as neutral credit infrastructure

namedFactions.name: Veyra-Locke Concession
namedFactions.publicFace: a concession office that treats resource law as a private operating system

namedFactions.name: Orison Route Authority
namedFactions.publicFace: a transit authority trusted to publish safe windows and customs schedules

namedFactions.name: Ash Meridian Navy
namedFactions.publicFace: a disciplined route-security fleet with sealed casualty accounting

namedFactions.name: Glasshouse Biosafety Compact
namedFactions.publicFace: a biosafety compact that can make quarantine feel like law

namedFactions.name: Kestrel Free Compact
namedFactions.publicFace: a loose compact of free captains, smugglers, and emergency haulers

namedFactions.name: Ninth Ledger Office
namedFactions.publicFace: a quiet compliance office that seals records before anyone can ask why

namedFactions.name: Red Vane Labor Combine
namedFactions.publicFace: a worker federation that controls repair crews, strike funds, and funeral broadcasts

namedFactions.name: Sepulcher Archive Court
namedFactions.publicFace: a salvage court that makes dead charters dangerous again

namedFactions.name: Pale Choir Communion
namedFactions.publicFace: a warning rite network that treats route disasters as moral evidence

science.label: Science and Survey
secrets: the published model omits a lethal outlier

exploration.label: Exploration and Routes
secrets: the safer route window was suppressed

stellar-events.label: Stellar Events
secrets: the storm forecast was softened for traffic revenue
the shelter capacity numbers are false

route-weather.label: Route Weather
secrets: the published route weather omits a profitable danger window
a dispatcher sold the safe window twice

infrastructure.label: Infrastructure and Life Support
secrets: maintenance logs were altered before the failure
the repair backlog is being used as political leverage

religion.label: Religion and Meaning
secrets: a faction is provoking Gardener attention

gardener-interdiction.label: Gardener Interdiction
secrets: a faction is provoking attention to discredit rivals

terraforming.label: Terraforming Debt
secrets: the terraforming failure was legally profitable
the climate model was falsified before colonists arrived

medicine.label: Medicine and Exposure
secrets: the exposure syndrome was detected before the public alert

disaster.label: Disaster and Containment
secrets: the containment plan saves the assets first

information-integrity.label: Information Integrity
secrets: the official record combines two incompatible lies
the truthful archive is stored under a false identity

daily-life.label: Daily Life
secrets: ordinary records hide the real casualty count
the public schedule masks an evacuation plan

migration.label: Migration and Refuge
secrets: a refugee ark is being hidden from creditors

ai.label: Narrow AI
secrets: the AI has a lawful override

leverage: access to a safe bleed window
threats: public panic over false sensor returns
secrets: a lawful AI override nobody will admit
a quarantine order written after the disaster
a truthful archive stored under a false identity
claims: the AI has a lawful override
the strike was provoked by management
the official archive is a composite lie
choices: open the records and risk system-wide panic
protect the route and abandon the exposed settlement
break quarantine to save the people outside it
side with legal title or present need
evacuate the workers or preserve the resource window
trust the censored AI or the official board
publish the casualty list or keep the peace
pay the debt trust or fund habitat repairs
honor the route forecast or launch before the storm
repair the life-support spine or preserve the resource window
release the exposure records or prevent a quarantine panic

narrativeStructures.label: Painful Struggle
narrativeStructures.template: System is locked in a painful struggle between the {groupA} and the {groupB} over {stake}.

narrativeStructures.label: Brittle Protectorate
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} keeps order by controlling {leverage}, but the {groupB} is turning {pressure} into a cause.

narrativeStructures.label: Costly Extraction
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} can profit from {stake}, but {pressure} has made the {groupB} desperate enough to act.

narrativeStructures.label: Quarantine Secret
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} claims {threat} requires harsh controls, while the {groupB} insists the real issue is {secret}.

narrativeStructures.label: Route Chokepoint
narrativeStructures.template: Control of {routeAsset} lets the {groupA} tax every ship, unless the {groupB} can prove {claim}.

narrativeStructures.label: Moving Bleed Rush
narrativeStructures.template: {stake} has created a rush around {routeAsset}, and the {groupA} is using {leverage} before {threat} closes the window.

narrativeStructures.label: First-Wave Inheritance
narrativeStructures.template: A first-wave claim around {routeAsset} could overturn {stake}, but the {groupA} needs {secret} to stay buried.

narrativeStructures.label: AI Witness
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} wants custody of the AI record at {sceneAnchor}, because it can prove {claim} unless {threat} destroys the testimony.

narrativeStructures.label: Gardener Warning
narrativeStructures.template: After {threat}, the {groupA} treats {routeAsset} as a warning sign, while the {groupB} argues that {choice}.

narrativeStructures.label: Labor Under Vacuum
narrativeStructures.template: {public} depend on {leverage}, so {pressure} has turned the {groupA} and the {groupB} into open enemies.

narrativeStructures.label: Public Life Under Hazard
narrativeStructures.template: Daily life now centers on {sceneAnchor}: {public} are caught between {pressure} and the official promise that {threat} is under control.

narrativeStructures.label: Biosphere Exploitation
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} calls {stake} harmless research, but {pressure} has convinced the {groupB} that {secret}.

narrativeStructures.label: Refugee Resettlement Fight
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} promises {stake}, but {public} know {claim}, and {pressure} is making compromise impossible.

narrativeStructures.label: Salvage Fraud
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} is using {claim} to seize {routeAsset}, but the {groupB} found {secret} in {sceneAnchor}.

narrativeStructures.label: Election Under Interdiction
narrativeStructures.template: {public} are being asked to accept the {groupA}'s emergency rule until {threat} passes, but the {groupB} can prove {claim}.

narrativeStructures.label: Quiet Pilgrimage
narrativeStructures.template: {public} gather at {sceneAnchor} whenever {routeAsset} is safe, and the {groupA} fears the ritual will expose {secret}.

narrativeStructures.label: False Pirate Threat
narrativeStructures.template: Everyone blames {threat} for the lockdown, but the real leverage is {leverage}, and the {groupA} benefits if {claim}.

narrativeStructures.label: Flare Season Shelter
narrativeStructures.template: {threat} has made {leverage} the only thing keeping {public} alive, and the {groupA} is hiding {secret}.

narrativeStructures.label: Route Weather Auction
narrativeStructures.template: {routeAsset} is safe only during a narrow window, so the {groupA} is auctioning {leverage} while the {groupB} warns that {claim}.

narrativeStructures.label: Interdiction Compliance
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} says {routeAsset} must stay sealed after {threat}, but {public} believe {secret}.

narrativeStructures.label: Life-Support Hostage
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} controls {leverage}, but {pressure} means the {groupB} can force a crisis without firing a shot.

narrativeStructures.label: Terraforming Liability
narrativeStructures.template: {public} were promised {stake}, but {threat} exposed {secret} and turned the {groupA} into the only legal target.

narrativeStructures.label: Exposure Triage
narrativeStructures.template: {public} crowd {sceneAnchor} after {threat}, while the {groupA} decides whether {choice}.

narrativeStructures.label: Archive Integrity Crisis
narrativeStructures.template: The {groupA} can prove {claim}, but {leverage} will collapse if {secret} becomes public.
